emails.subject: Class
emails.body: Class Karen, I will be in a class on Nov 27-28. The class in on "Understanding Options". Let me know if this is OK with you. Thanks, Monika To: Causholli, Monika

emails.subject: RE: Class
emails.body: RE: Class Monika, Was this already approved by Andrea? Karen To: Carter, Karen E.

emails.subject: RE: Class
emails.body: I think so. They don't register you until the person in charge approves it. To: Causholli, Monika

emails.subject: RE: Class
emails.body: Monika, I understand from Tammi that you can register without approval. As EIM is currently not approving budget for classes, you will need to have the analyst pool support you for this. Karen To: Carter, Karen E.
